summary: Implemented tenant nullable runtime enforcement after live proof refresh: acquisition transaction/report/postback runtime paths and cadence due/missing-state queries now require tenant ownership, with forward cleanup migrations for proven legacy partial indexes.

acceptance_results.criterion: Acquisition slug-only campaign lookup no longer depends on tenant_id IS NULL as the canonical runtime path.
acceptance_results.reason: Transaction creation now requires tenant_key and resolves campaigns through GetByTenantKeyAndSlug; signed public tenant headers are copied into the request when the body omits tenant_key. Report joins and postback template lookup also require tenant equality. The remaining public GetBySlug/ListEnabled path is documented as explicit API compatibility with zero live tenantless campaign rows.

acceptance_results.criterion: Cadence due/missing-state queries no longer accept NULL tenant matches after proof.
acceptance_results.reason: ClaimDueStatesTx and ListMissingStates now require tenant equality between subscription state, subscriptions, and product message series.

acceptance_results.criterion: Forward migrations clean legacy partial indexes or nullable constraints only where proof exists.
acceptance_results.reason: The new migrations drop idx_campaigns_legacy_slug and idx_product_message_series_legacy_key. Acquisition cleanup is wired into the service-local schema bootstrap after campaign tenant binding. Notification legacy idempotency is preserved because live notifications still contain tenantless rows.

cleanup_notes: No dev service was started or restarted from this worktree.
A stale .agent/tasks.json.lock was removed after confirming no harness process held it.
completed_work: Refreshed credentialed live schema proof using the root workspace .env.

Confirmed zero tenantless rows for campaigns, acquisition_transactions, products, userbase, postback_outbox, subscriptions, product_message_series, subscription_message_state, message_outbox, and admin_subscription_action_logs.
Kept admin_activity_logs and notifications nullable because live proof still shows one and ten tenantless rows respectively.
Removed acquisition runtime nullable campaign matching from transaction creation, report joins, manual postback trigger, and callback template lookup.
Removed cadence runtime tenant-null matching from due-state claiming and missing-state listing.
Added forward cleanup migrations for proven legacy partial indexes and wired acquisition cleanup into service-local schema bootstrap.
Updated TMP-055 evidence with residual API/data gaps and verification commands.
known_gaps: Public campaign GetBySlug/ListEnabled still expose explicit tenant_id IS NULL compatibility. Live proof shows zero matching campaigns, and transaction/report/postback runtime paths no longer use it; removing the public API compatibility path needs a separate API decision.
admin_activity_logs has one tenantless row and notifications has ten tenantless rows, so broad NOT NULL enforcement and notification legacy idempotency cleanup remain blocked.
Channel ownership proof was not part of TMP-055; cadence channel-null compatibility remains documented as out of scope.
operator_message: TMP-055 is complete on this branch: no hardcoded nrg runtime fallback was introduced, transaction/report/postback/cadence runtime paths now require tenant ownership, and proven legacy partial indexes have forward cleanup migrations.
risk_notes: Transaction creation now requires tenant context. The handler preserves signed-header callers by copying the verified tenant key into the request when tenant_key is absent from the JSON body.
Existing historical migrations were not rewritten; cleanup was added as forward migrations.
Supervisor preflight still reports unrelated historical/schedulable warnings.

validation.output_excerpt: ok acquisition-api/internal/repository; ok acquisition-api/internal/service; ok acquisition-api/internal/handler

validation.command: git diff --check && jq empty slices/manifest.json agent/state/TMP-055.work-order.json

validation.output_excerpt: ok true; six existing historical/schedulable warnings
